seo_description: Current time in Minneapolis, Minnesota — live Central Time (CST/CDT) clock, DST schedule, and time differences with major US and world cities.

faq.question: What time is it in Minneapolis right now?
faq.answer: Minneapolis, Minnesota, USA uses Central Standard Time (CST, UTC-6) in winter and Central Daylight Time (CDT, UTC-5) during Daylight Saving Time in summer. The IANA identifier is America/Chicago. Clocks spring forward on the second Sunday in March and fall back on the first Sunday in November. Minneapolis shares its time zone with Chicago, Dallas, Houston, and Kansas City. The IANA timezone identifier is America/Chicago.

faq.question: What time zone is Minneapolis in?
faq.answer: Minneapolis is in the Central Time Zone (CT), observing CST (UTC-6) from November to March and CDT (UTC-5) from March to November. Minnesota is entirely on Central Time. The Twin Cities metro (Minneapolis–Saint Paul) is the largest metropolitan area in the Central Time Zone after Chicago. The IANA identifier is America/Chicago.

faq.question: Does Minneapolis observe daylight saving time?
faq.answer: Yes. Minneapolis observes Daylight Saving Time. Clocks spring forward 1 hour on the second Sunday in March at 2:00 AM (becoming 3:00 AM CDT, UTC-5) and fall back on the first Sunday in November at 2:00 AM (becoming 1:00 AM CST, UTC-6). Minnesota follows federal DST rules under the Uniform Time Act of 1966.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Minneapolis and New York?
faq.answer: Minneapolis (CST, UTC-6) is 1 hour behind New York (EST, UTC-5) year-round. Both cities observe Daylight Saving Time on the same schedule, so the 1-hour gap is constant. When it is 9:00 AM in Minneapolis, it is 10:00 AM in New York.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Minneapolis and Los Angeles?
faq.answer: Minneapolis (CST, UTC-6) is 2 hours ahead of Los Angeles (PST, UTC-8) year-round. Both cities observe Daylight Saving Time on the same schedule, so the 2-hour gap is constant. When it is 9:00 AM in Los Angeles, it is 11:00 AM in Minneapolis.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Minneapolis and London?
faq.answer: Minneapolis (CST, UTC-6) is 6 hours behind London (GMT, UTC+0) in winter. During US and UK Daylight Saving Time, Minneapolis (CDT, UTC-5) and London (BST, UTC+1) maintain the 6-hour gap. Brief windows in spring and autumn when one transitions before the other may create a 5 or 7 hour gap.

faq.question: What are typical business hours in Minneapolis?
faq.answer: Standard business hours in Minneapolis are 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM CST/CDT, Monday through Friday. Minneapolis is Minnesota's largest city and a major regional financial, healthcare, and manufacturing center. Fortune 500 companies headquartered there include Target, Best Buy, US Bancorp, and General Mills. The Minneapolis Grain Exchange is a major commodity trading hub.
